title: Goeppertia cannoides
taxonomy: Goeppertia cannoides is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Marantaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant belongs to the genus Goeppertia, which is a part of the Marantaceae family. The classification further categorizes it as a monocot, having a single cotyledon in its seed. At the kingdom level, it falls under Plantae, as it is a plant species.
